steps.t: Horace Roxhythe hid one of his arrow-heads somewhere in Evendim. He crossed from the island of Tinnudir to the mainland on the stone bridge. You have …
Horace Roxhythe is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir. You have found the arrow-head that Horace hid in Evendim and should return it to him …
